name: BUG82-Filter-Packaging-Items
script: frappe.ui.form.on("Sample Request AMB", {refresh(frm) {frm.fields_dict.samples.grid.get_field("package_type").get_query = function(doc, cdt, cdn) {return {filters: {item_group: "Sample Packaging Materials"}};};frm.fields_dict.samples.grid.get_field("container_type").get_query = function(doc, cdt, cdn) {return {filters: {item_group: "FG Packaging Materials"}};};}});
